description_long: This object consists of three distinct pastries arranged on a flat, light-colored surface. The central pastry is a large, twisted pretzel with a golden-brown crust and visible coarse salt, featuring a white filling or glaze in some crevices. To one side, there is a round, domed pastry with a pale, lightly browned exterior, resembling a plain bread roll or bun. The third pastry is a small, round donut with a chocolate glaze and a white icing pattern in a web-like design on top. All items appear fresh, with a soft, slightly glossy finish, and no visible packaging or branding. The surface beneath them is flat and appears to be a sheet of paper or a thin mat with faint line drawings.
description: Three pastries—a pretzel with white filling, a plain bun, and a chocolate-glazed donut with white icing—are arranged on a flat, light surface.
description_view_0: The pretzel is prominent in the foreground, with the chocolate-glazed donut and plain bun positioned behind it.
description_view_1: The pretzel is on the left, the chocolate-glazed donut is at the back, and the plain bun is on the right, showing more of the donut's icing pattern.
description_view_2: The plain bun is in the foreground, the pretzel is at the back, and the chocolate-glazed donut is on the right, displaying the donut's top clearly.
description_view_3: The chocolate-glazed donut is in the foreground, the pretzel is to the right, and the plain bun is at the back, highlighting the donut's icing and the pretzel's filling.
attribute_icing_type: Chocolate glaze with white icing pattern on one donut; white filling or glaze in pretzel crevices; none on plain bun.
attribute_topping_type: Coarse salt on pretzel; none on donut or bun.
attribute_placement_location: On a flat, light-colored sheet or mat with faint line drawings.
